§ 00Est. 1966 · Elkhart, Indiana
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_font_size="128px" header_font_size_tablet="80px" header_font_size_phone="52px" header_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_line_height="0.85em" header_letter_spacing="-0.01em" module_class="kopf-reveal" global_colors_info="{}"]

Kopf Logistics
Group

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" custom_padding="24px|0|0|20px|false|false" custom_margin="24px||||false|false" border_color_all="#EA580C" border_width_left="4px" border_style_all="none" border_style_left="solid" module_class="kopf-reveal" global_colors_info="{}"]

50 Years

of Excellence!

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="28px||||false|false" max_width="640px" module_class="kopf-reveal" global_colors_info="{}"]

For over 50 years, Kopf Logistics Group has been a pioneer in the trucking logistics sector, offering a 70/30 commission split, dedicated 24/7 office support, weekly settlements, and an award-winning Transportation Management System (TMS). We pride ourselves on being a one-stop solution for independent freight agents, shippers, drivers, and carriers, addressing their unique challenges and pain points with innovative solutions and unparalleled support.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
70/30 Commission Split Dedicated 24/7 Office Support Weekly Settlements Award-Winning TMS
[/et_pb_code][et_pb_row_inner _builder_version="4.27.0" custom_margin="32px|||||false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column_inner type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_button button_text="Become a Freight Agent" button_url="/agent" button_alignment="left" _builder_version="4.27.0" module_class="kopf-btn kopf-btn-solid" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_button][et_pb_button button_text="Call 574.349.5600" button_url="tel:5743495600" button_alignment="left" _builder_version="4.27.0" module_class="kopf-btn kopf-btn-outline" custom_margin="|||16px|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="|||0|false|false" custom_margin_phone="16px||||false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_button][/et_pb_column_inner][/et_pb_row_inner][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#F5EFE6" text_font="JetBrains Mono||||||||" text_font_size="13px" custom_margin="24px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

✉ E: recruiter@kopflogisticsgroup.com

☎ T: 574.349.5600

§ 01Our Story in 3 Minutes
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="72px" header_2_font_size_tablet="56px" header_2_font_size_phone="44px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Why Kopf?

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="24px||||false|false" max_width="520px" global_colors_info="{}"]

A second-generation, family-owned truck brokerage built on sound financial strength and relationships that stand the test of time. Hear why independent freight agents choose Team Kopf.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_video src="https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KuJq8F-uSkM" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_video][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="Testimonials" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#17110C" border_color_all="rgba(245,239,230,0.1)" border_width_top="1px" border_width_bottom="1px" border_style_all="none" border_style_top="solid" border_style_bottom="solid" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ TESTIMONIALSVerified Google Reviews
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="64px" header_2_font_size_tablet="48px" header_2_font_size_phone="36px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" custom_margin="||16px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

What They Say
About Working With Kopf

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.6em" custom_margin="16px|||||false" max_width="680px" module_alignment="center" global_colors_info="{}"]

Unedited reviews from shippers, carriers, owner operators and freight agents who've moved loads with us — pulled directly from Google Business.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
NC
Nelson Caseiro
Partner · a year ago
★★★★★

“Kopf Logistics Group has consistently proven to be a reliable partner in the logistics industry. Their dedication to efficiency and customer satisfaction sets them apart from competitors.”

HI
Hillandale
Shipper · 7 years ago
★★★★★

“We have been working with Kopf and the Search2Transport team for quite some time now. They do a phenomenal job helping cover our overflow freight. They provide great customer service and teamwork, their team is very professional and courteous. We love working with them!”

LC
Lamont Cotton
Carrier · 3 years ago
★★★★★

“Ran a load for this company, everything went very well. Pick and drop off times were as they said. Great company to work with. Rate was great and Zach was amazing to work with and was there throughout the whole process. I would recommend this company.”

AS
Angel S.
Carrier Partner · 3 years ago
★★★★★

“Great Service. It was a pleasure working with Zach. I have been collaborating for about 10 years with Tom Stanfill. He is such a nice guy, always helpful. I wish all the brokers were like Kopf.”

OS
Ochuko Sodje
Owner Operator · 2 years ago
★★★★★

“This is one of the best companies I have ever worked with. Zach Moore was the guy I worked with. Please always update me on your Hotshot loads in the St. Louis, MO area. I will definitely work with you guys again.”

AO
Akpoemuode Ovien
Carrier · 2 years ago
★★★★★

“Working with you guys was an exciting and uplifting experience. I will never forget the heart-warming treatment from your well-trained and experienced staff. I wish all logistics companies were like yours.”

MT
Matar Transport
Contract Carrier · 8 months ago
★★★★★

“Very good company and employees — especially Rishab, very polite and helpful. I would like to do more business in the future.”

VA
Victorious Ambition
Freight Agent · 9 months ago
★★★★★

“Nolan was a man of his word. That's what you ask for and he delivered. His company is better served with people like him leading the way. They have premium freight opportunities and deserve to be acknowledged.”

4.6/ 5.0
★★★★★
Based on 94 Verified Google Reviews
Read All Reviews →
[/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§02 Operational Excellence" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#0F0B08" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="5_12,7_12" _builder_version="4.27.0" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="4" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="5_12" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 02The Discipline of Shipping
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="68px" header_2_font_size_phone="44px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Operational
Excellence

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="28px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

Solid business relationships hinge on producing solutions that are reliable, consistent and timely. Kopf listens to your transportation needs and communicates its expertise through technology to help achieve lower costs, operational efficiencies and increased profits.

We work to understand our customers' businesses and, as a result, deliver the right combination of people, assets and ideas that make a measurable bottom-line difference.

We strive to maintain operational excellence at all times, never compromising our integrity or reputation, and have become the first choice for our customers by simplifying the shipping process.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="7_12" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/7964413/pexels-photo-7964413.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1600" alt="Kopf operations team" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" custom_margin="-60px||0|auto|false|false" custom_margin_tablet="0|||0|false|false" custom_margin_phone="0|||0|false|false" custom_margin_last_edited="on|phone" max_width="260px" module_alignment="right" global_colors_info="{}"]
Combined Experience
300+
Years
[/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§03 Kopf Advantage" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#17110C" border_color_all="rgba(245,239,230,0.08)" border_width_top="1px" border_width_bottom="1px" border_style_all="none" border_style_top="solid" border_style_bottom="solid" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 03Benefits That Compound
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="68px" header_2_font_size_phone="44px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

The Kopf Advantage

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="20px||||false|false" max_width="640px" global_colors_info="{}"]

Partnering with Kopf Logistics Group means unlocking a wealth of benefits for your business. Our comprehensive suite of services ensures you receive:

Sound Financial Strength

07

Freight to Fill Your Trailers

[/et_pb_code][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
McLeod TMS

Our transportation management technology enhances existing operations, maximizes your carrier network and decreases costs.

[/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§04 TMS Capabilities" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#0F0B08" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="5_12,7_12" _builder_version="4.27.0" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="4" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="5_12" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 0411 Integrated Modules
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="60px" header_2_font_size_phone="40px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Our TMS Capabilities

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="16px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="24px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

Our state-of-the-art Transportation Management System (TMS) lies at the heart of our operations, enabling us to provide exceptional service to our clients. With features like real-time tracking, advanced analytics, and seamless communication, our TMS equips you with the tools you need to optimize your logistics operations.

[/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§05 Equipment We Operate" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#0F0B08" background_image="https://kopflogisticsgroup.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/06/operate_bg_orange.jpg" use_background_color_gradient="on" background_color_gradient_stops="rgba(15,11,8,0.92) 0%|rgba(15,11,8,0.88) 100%" background_color_gradient_type="linear" background_color_gradient_direction="135deg" background_color_gradient_overlays_image="on" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="4_4" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 0510 Transportation Options
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="68px" header_2_font_size_phone="44px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Equipment We Operate

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="20px||||false|false" max_width="720px" global_colors_info="{}"]

At Kopf Logistics Group, we put years of equipment investment at your fingertips to help your business find the best and most cost-effective transportation options. Our fast response time will provide you with the service you need to improve your supply chain productivity. The following transportation options are available:

[/et_pb_code][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§06 Business Solutions" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#0F0B08" custom_padding="100px||100px||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="4" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/4487363/pexels-photo-4487363.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1400" alt="Warehouse operations" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 06Technology + Teamwork
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="56px" header_2_font_size_phone="40px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Our Business Solutions

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="24px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

At Kopf, we know you have many options to choose from to haul your freight or load your trucks. That's why Kopf champions investment in technology, whether to optimize the performance of our fleet, or to match your shipping needs with the capabilities and capacity of our contract carrier network.

Our business office is professionally staffed with employees trained to utilize TMS technology to simplify shipping processes and allow Kopf to haul more loads. We also make use of a cloud-based disaster recovery system to minimize down time in our business office in the event of an accident or natural disaster.

[/et_pb_text][/et_pb_column][/et_pb_row][/et_pb_section][et_pb_section fb_built="1" admin_label="§07 Shippers Band" _builder_version="4.27.0" background_color="#17110C" custom_padding="0|0|0|0|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_row column_structure="1_2,1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" use_custom_gutter="on" gutter_width="1" custom_padding="0|0|0|0|false|false" max_width="100%" width="100%" custom_margin="|auto|-1px|auto|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" custom_padding="0|0|0|0|false|false" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_image src="https://images.pexels.com/photos/5876475/pexels-photo-5876475.jpeg?auto=compress&cs=tinysrgb&w=1400" alt="Shipper loading dock" _builder_version="4.27.0" show_bottom_space="off" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_image][/et_pb_column][et_pb_column type="1_2" _builder_version="4.27.0" custom_padding="60px|60px|60px|60px|false|false" custom_padding_tablet="40px|30px|40px|30px|false|false" custom_padding_phone="40px|24px|40px|24px|false|false" custom_padding_last_edited="on|phone" global_colors_info="{}"][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" global_colors_info="{}"]
§ 07For Manufacturers & Distributors
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="56px" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Shippers

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="20px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

For our shippers, deploying technology is a practical decision centered on our desire to provide an outstanding service experience and streamline your shipping processes. Hauling freight is our livelihood, and we value building customer relationships that stand the test of time. Our technology allows us to be responsive to your needs and enhances good business decisions time and again.

§ 12A Family of Faith
[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" header_2_font="Anton|||on|||||" header_2_text_color="#F5EFE6" header_2_font_size="96px" header_2_font_size_phone="56px" header_2_font_size_last_edited="on|phone" header_2_line_height="0.95em" global_colors_info="{}"]

Our Higher Purpose

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_text _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" text_text_color="#D6CFC3" text_font_size="17px" text_line_height="1.65em" custom_margin="32px||||false|false" global_colors_info="{}"]

Finding deep meaning and fulfillment in life starts with a clear sense of purpose. The understanding there is something to strive for bigger than self, broadens our vision and challenges us to make a difference in the lives of others. Fulfillment is found when we step out of our comfort zone and care enough to become involved in our community and world.

As a family of faith, we have been blessed with a clear sense of purpose, to feed people. Millions of people go to bed at night wondering where their next meal will come from. Hunger, food insecurity and poverty affects people of all walks of life. At Kopf, we are grateful for a unique opportunity to share our love for Jesus with others through the giving of food, the gift that provides nourishment for people to flourish and thrive.

[/et_pb_text][et_pb_divider color="rgba(234,88,12,0.35)" divider_weight="1px" _builder_version="4.27.0" max_width="80%" module_alignment="center" custom_margin="40px|||||false" global_colors_info="{}"][/et_pb_divider][et_pb_code _builder_version="4.27.0" text_orientation="center" module_alignment="center" global_colors_info="{}"]

“Give them something to eat.”

— Luke 9:13
